# WebDragSourceAction

**Structure**

Actions that the source object of a drag operation can perform.

## Declaration

```swift
struct WebDragSourceAction
```

## Constants

- **DHTML**: Allows DHTML (such as JavaScript) in the source object to initiate a drag operation.
- **image**: Allows the user to drag an image in the source object.
- **link**: Allows the user to drag a link in the source object.
- **selection**: Allows the user to drag a selection in the source object.
- **any**: Allows any defined action to occur.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **Menu Item Tags**: Tags that define the types of default menu items passed to the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebUIDelegate/webView(_:contextMenuItemsForElement:defaultMenuItems:)] method.
- **WebDragDestinationAction**: Actions that the destination object of a drag operation can perform.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
